case_title: AU-SCOTT, MARIA THERESA et al VS AIR FRANCE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AU-SCOTT, MARIA THERESA SCOTT, RODGER K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIR FRANCE CSAA  AAA TRAVEL AGENCY $4,973.46 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,019.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT, AIR FRANCE, REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIOER AFTER 15 DAYS.
MOTION IS SET FOR FEB. 22, 1999, AT 10:00 A.M MOTION TO BE HEARD BY COMM. SLOAN. IN DEPT. 506 400 MCALLISTER ST. S.F.
DEF.COMPAGNIE NATIONALE AIR FRANCE'S NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES & THE STATE COURT THAT ACTION HAS BEEN RE- MOVED TO FEDERAL COURT.
